title: Lio – The world's first multi agent system for procurement
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Lio – The world's first multi agent system for procurement
The world's first multi agent system for procurement
Lio builds the world's first AI procurement workforce for global enterprises. Every purchase request is managed by specialized agents working in parallel—researching vendors, negotiating terms, managing approvals, and tracking deliveries simultaneously. What once consumed your team's hours is now executed by a coordinated network of AI Agents.
Request Demo
Announcing Lio's $30M Series A, led by Andreessen Horowitz!
Watch the announcement video here.
DPW Growth Award Winner
Trusted by Industry Leaders
Next-Gen Intelligence
The Engine Behind a New Era of Procurement
A single request enters the system. Within seconds, multiple agents research, negotiate, validate, and complete the order — all in parallel.
"In collaboration with Lio, we are redefining the future of Purchasing at Schaeffler. The rapid progress and measurable outcomes underscore the transformative potential of agentic AI. This collaboration strengthens our AI-driven capabilities, increases efficiency at scale, and underlines our ambition to be a pioneer in innovation and operational excellence."
Andreas Schick,
COO at Schaeffler
We seamlessly integrate with your existing P2P / ERP systems.
For your Industry
Empowering the Industries that Power the World
Frustrated Requestors
Operational Overload
Untapped Savings Potential
Your AI workforce running procurement end-to-end.

Five layers.
One transformation.
We transform procurement through five layers
Lio doesn’t just automate tasks – we fundamentally transform how procurement operates. Each layer creates value on its own, and you can start with whichever layer makes the most sense for you. The order is up to you.
Agent-Augmented Buying
Operational Automation
Scaled Savings
Supercharge Buyers
Agent Supervisor & AOPs
Make your users fall in love with procurement
Source suppliers, negotiate contracts, optimize spend. Secure your competitive advantage.
Agent-Augmented Buying
Procurement automated
Tame the Tailspend
Supercharge your Buyers
The Agentic Workforce
Lio turns complex buying into an effortless, guided experience. When agents make procurement intuitive, users naturally stay compliant.
85% reduction in operational workload
Scale Savings Without Scaling Headcount
Gain 10x efficiency with Lio Agents
Manage and scale your personal Agentic Workforce
Our Product
Proven Impact at
Enterprise Scale
Reduction of Manual Work
85%
85% of procurement operations are done by Lio Agents, freeing your team from repetitive tasks.
Additional Savings
10%
Through automated negotiations and intelligent spend optimization, our customers generate an average of 10% additional cost savings.
Adoption Rate
>95%
Over 95% of procurement requests now flow through Lio's standardized, compliant processes, eliminating non-compliant spending and ensuring policy adherence across the organization.
Retention Rate
100%
Not a single customer has churned since we started—they stay because the value is undeniable and the system becomes mission-critical to their operations.
Users
1,000,000+
In less than three years, Lio has grown to 1,000,000+ users across 150+ enterprises.
Enterprise Clients
150+
Leading global enterprises trust Lio to run their procurement operations.
Integration in less than
2 Weeks
Lio can be integrated in less than two weeks, including approvals, implementation, training, and hypercare.
Our Promise to you
You've seen the five layers-how we simplify buying, automate operations, scale savings, supercharge your buyers and enable you to manage your Agentic Workforce.
This is the foundation we want to build on.
Procurement was a place where complexity hides in plain sight, where strategic decisions are trapped in spreadsheets, and where some of the brightest minds spend their time chasing approvals instead of creating value.
Our vision isn't about replacing people. It's about giving them their time back, their creativity back, their purpose back. Because when all this noise is gone, people don't just work better - they shine. They think more clearly. They lead with intention. They move entire systems forward.
And this is where we come in - bringing this technology to life. To turn potential into outcomes. To build agents that do the operative grunt work and agents that support in strategic work - so people can finally do the great work they're capable of.
Real change starts in messy, vital systems that keep the world running, and we see it as our responsibility to shepherd every procurement professional through this evolution.
Guiding you through each layer until you emerge not as task executors, but as agent supervisors.
Enterprise-Grade Compliance
Enterprise Security guaranteed
ISO 27001 Certified
Enterprise Security: ISO 27001 certified, ensuring the highest standards of information security management.

Most prestigious startup accelerator in the entire world (acceptance rate of 5%) - Lio is trained by the most renowned founder in the entire world (Sam Altman!)

Proven. Recognized. Adopted.
The most awarded and adopted multi-agent
procurement system worldwide
Over 150 procurement solutions applied – and we prevailed against competitors twice our age. A jury of 80+ international CPOs from leading enterprises selected Lio as the winner for DPW Growth Award.
Awarded the BME Procurement Excellence Award with REHAU — recognizing our innovation and the trust our customers place in us.
We won every Award we ever participated in
Let’s discuss
Book a personal consultation
Let’s discuss your current procurement challenges and explore how generative AI can transform your operations. The consultation is free and non-binding.
Vladimir Keil
CEO, Lio
or call us directly
+49 15888 633603 or +1 (646) 776-4657

Watch the announcement video here.

markdown_snapshot:
# Lio – The world's first multi agent system for procurement

- raw_id: R-001
- original_url: https://lio.ai/
- source_name: keyword search / Anysearch
- collected_at: 2026-06-07T05:57:12.249Z

## clean_text

Lio – The world's first multi agent system for procurement
The world's first multi agent system for procurement
Lio builds the world's first AI procurement workforce for global enterprises. Every purchase request is managed by specialized agents working in parallel—researching vendors, negotiating terms, managing approvals, and tracking deliveries simultaneously. What once consumed your team's hours is now executed by a coordinated network of AI Agents.

Next-Gen Intelligence
The Engine Behind a New Era of Procurement

Manage and scale your personal Agentic Workforce
Our Product
Proven Impact at
Enterprise Scale
Reduction of Manual Work
85%
85% of procurement operations are done by Lio Agents, freeing your team from repetitive tasks.
Additional Savings
10%
Through automated negotiations and intelligent spend optimization, our customers generate an average of 10% additional cost savings.
Adoption Rate
>95%
Over 95% of procurement requests now flow through Lio's standardized, compliant processes, eliminating non-compliant spending and ensuring policy adherence across the organization.
Retention Rate
100%
Not a single customer has churned since we started—they stay because the value is undeniable and the system becomes mission-critical to their operations.
Users
1,000,000+
In less than three years, Lio has grown to 1,000,000+ users across 150+ enterprises.
Enterprise Clients
150+
Leading global enterprises trust Lio to run their procurement operations.
Integration in less than
2 Weeks
Lio can be integrated in less than two weeks, including approvals, implementation, training, and hypercare.
Our Promise to you
You've seen the five layers-how we simplify buying, automate operations, scale savings, supercharge your buyers and enable you to manage your Agentic Workforce.
This is the foundation we want to build on.
Procurement was a place where complexity hides in plain sight, where strategic decisions are trapped in spreadsheets, and where some of the brightest minds spend their time chasing approvals instead of creating value.
Our vision isn't about replacing people. It's about giving them their time back, their creativity back, their purpose back. Because when all this noise is gone, people don't just work better - they shine. They think more clearly. They lead with intention. They move entire systems forward.
And this is where we come in - bringing this technology to life. To turn potential into outcomes. To build agents that do the operative grunt work and agents that support in strategic work - so people can finally do the great work they're capable of.
Real change starts in messy, vital systems that keep the world running, and we see it as our responsibility to shepherd every procurement professional through this evolution.
Guiding you through each layer until you emerge not as task executors, but as agent supervisors.
